name: GH_PaletteSettings
summary: (No description provided in vendor docs for Grasshopper.GUI.Theme.GH_PaletteSettings.)

properties.name: ErrorSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for selected Error palettes.

properties.name: ErrorStandard
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for unselected Error palettes.

properties.name: HiddenSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for selected Hidden palettes.

properties.name: HiddenStandard
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for unselected Hidden palettes.

properties.name: LockedSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for selected Locked palettes.

properties.name: LockedStandard
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for unselected Locked palettes.

properties.name: NormalSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for selected Normal palettes.

properties.name: NormalStandard
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for unselected Normal palettes.

properties.name: WarningSelected
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for selected Warning palettes.

properties.name: WarningStandard
properties.summary: Gets or sets the palette style for unselected Warning palettes.
